programmes.show_description: AI is a current reality reshaping our daily lives and entire industries. Korea, in particular, is one of the countries most dynamically experiencing this change.
This programme takes you on a five-star local journey with Korean actor Oh Ji-ho and trot singer Shin Seong, exploring hidden gems and unique experiences that reveal a fresh side of Korea.
A special news programme.
The news talk show covers recent trends and current affairs from people of the Millennium and the Zoomers generation.
Want to know more about K-culture? Crunch on a different flavour of K-culture every day with Su Jung on Culture Crunch!
Arirang News provides up-to-the-minute, objective and in-depth coverage of news.
A documentary series about homes, people and space; this programme shows various houses in Korea and introduces the living culture and architectural technology of the country.
A programme showing contemporary performances on stage; enjoy the full version of the newest dance and music performances originating from Korea.
Welcome to 'K-Culture Dive', where we dive deeper into the heart of Korean culture with daily K-entertainment issues and AI culture news.
